Enterprise customers served via UKG WFM Forecasting Platform

profile: Staff Software Engineer with 8+ years building high-scale distributed systems in Java, Spring Boot and Node.js. At UKG, developing People Fabric — a unified workforce data platform on AlloyDB (PostgreSQL) — via NRT event-driven pipelines with Kafka, while owning SLA compliance and mentoring engineers on distributed systems and production reliability. Previously at Walmart IDC, built and owned services serving millions of users — zero-to-production API design, Kubernetes deployments, Redis caching and full observability — for Virtual Try-On features shipped globally. Strong in system design (HLD/LLD), microservices architecture, and cloud-native delivery on Azure and GCP.

projects.title: Virtual Try-On Platform (CYOM/BYOM)
projects.desc: Delivered Create Your Own Model, Bring Your Own Model, and multiplayer try-on features at Walmart IDC, enabling customers to visualise clothing on body-matched avatars. Shipped globally across all Walmart markets, serving millions of customers.

projects.title: People Fabric — Unified Workforce Data Platform
projects.desc: UKG People Fabric aggregates workforce data across UKG's product suite into a centralized AlloyDB store, powering cross-product analytics, AI/ML models, and real-time workforce insights. Streamed WFM scheduling and labour entities (Tasks, Task Groups, Labour Standards) into People Fabric via NRT event-driven pipelines — including bulk-loading historical data into AlloyDB on entity onboarding — making forecasting data available organization-wide for the first time.

paragraphs: Staff Software Engineer with 8+ years of hands-on experience building backend systems, scalable microservices, and REST APIs for enterprise SaaS products.
My core expertise lies in Java, Spring Boot, and Node.js, applied daily at UKG on the WFM Forecasting Platform.

At UKG, I develop People Fabric — a unified workforce data platform built on AlloyDB (PostgreSQL) — own end-to-end SLA compliance and platform stability, and lead multi-tenant service onboarding via TRex across Staging, Prod-US & Prod-EU. Previously at Walmart IDC, I led end-to-end development of a secure media service and delivered virtual try-on at scale.

bullets.text: Leading registration of w-pwfm-swpforecasting on TRex — UKG's tenancy platform — across Staging, Prod-US & Prod-EU. Authored automation shell scripts, configured Auth0 credentials, validated API payloads and orchestrated PSI creation; cut onboarding time from weeks to days.

Developing backend features within People Fabric — UKG's unified workforce data platform built on AlloyDB (PostgreSQL) — streaming WFM scheduling and labour entities via NRT event-driven pipelines to power real-time forecasting insights for enterprise tenants.
Own end-to-end SLA compliance and platform stability across global enterprise accounts; mentor engineers on distributed systems patterns and production reliability standards.
Delivered Create Your Own Model, Bring Your Own Model and multiplayer try-on features enabling customers to visualise clothing on body-matched avatars; shipped globally across all Walmart markets.

Led end-to-end design and build of a secure media service from scratch serving millions of users; developed internal APIs, implemented security controls, integrated with Cosmos DB and leveraged Redis for caching to optimize performance.
Managed container deployments on Azure and built Prometheus and Grafana dashboards for production monitoring and alerting across microservices.
Mentored junior engineers through code reviews, design discussions, and engineering best practices across Java and Node.js services.
Led end-to-end feature development on a telehealth platform — built REST APIs, authored JUnit tests, integrated third-party services, and resolved customer defects directly in client sync-ups.
Owned features for a home remodelling platform end-to-end; authored high-level and low-level system architecture design diagrams (HLD/LLD) and improved platform performance.
Conducted code reviews for junior engineers, enforcing backend best practices across GraphQL APIs and Node.js services.
Contributed to a fintech lending platform integrating third-party financial APIs including Experian credit checks and fraud verification modules within a regulated financial environment.
Built full-stack features across data models, REST APIs, and UI for a civic-tech platform aggregating political data and predicting election results from user reviews.

certifications.name: Server-side Development with NodeJS, Express & MongoDB

achievements.title: Global Scale Delivery
achievements.text: Delivered Virtual Try-On (CYOM/BYOM) features shipped globally across all Walmart markets, enabling millions of customers to visualise clothing on body-matched avatars.

achievements.title: Onboarding Acceleration
achievements.text: Eliminated cold-start gaps in People Fabric by building bulk-load pipelines that backfill historical data into AlloyDB the moment an entity is first onboarded, instead of starting from an empty table.

achievements.title: Technical Leadership at Scale
achievements.text: Mentored engineers and led code reviews across UKG and Walmart, driving adoption of distributed systems best practices and raising engineering quality across teams.
